findings.description: A significant portion of content from the bottom half of the page is missing in the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, Section II concludes with bullets for 'Landfills', 'Risk Classification', 'Surface Water', and 'Not Applicable'. This is followed by the start of Section III and its first two bullets ('Beneficial Reuse Areas' and 'Costs'). All of this content is completely missing in the HTML rendering, which jumps directly from the 'Home Values' bullet to the 'Environmental Justice' bullet (which appears on page 4 in the PDF).
